archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) mixed with Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) for an Academic feel
brand_vibe: Premium EdTech platform, serious but accessible, architectural layout with high-contrast functional colors. No AI-slop purple gradients.

typography.heading_strategy: Use tight tracking (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter). Font weights should be bold or black for tension. Never center headings unless in hero sections.
typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-bold text-slate-900
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold text-slate-900

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (Mode B): Dense spacing for dashboards (gap-6) but generous internal padding for cards. Pure CSS Grid for lists.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-lg (8px max). Avoid pill shapes for main structural elements to maintain an architectural, serious look.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C92A2A] text-white hover:bg-[#A52A2A] transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium inline-flex items-center justify-center
buttons.secondary: bg-[#1E3A8A] text-white hover:bg-[#1E3A8A]/90 transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium inline-flex items-center justify-center
buttons.outline: border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium inline-flex items-center justify-center

cards.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
cards.course_card: flex flex-col bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden group hover:border-slate-300 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1
cards.bento_item: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm flex flex-col

sidebar.container: w-64 border-r border-slate-200 bg-white h-screen fixed flex flex-col
sidebar.item: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-md text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer
sidebar.active_item: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-md text-[#C92A2A] bg-red-50 font-medium cursor-pointer relative after:absolute after:left-0 after:top-1/2 after:-translate-y-1/2 after:h-1/2 after:w-1 after:bg-[#C92A2A] after:rounded-r-md

video_player.container: aspect-video bg-black rounded-lg overflow-hidden relative shadow-lg ring-1 ring-slate-200
video_player.playlist_section: lg:col-span-1 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-4 h-[600px] overflow-y-auto

mcq_test.question_container: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-8 shadow-sm
mcq_test.option_button: w-full text-left p-4 border border-slate-200 rounded-md hover:border-[#C92A2A] hover:bg-red-50 transition-colors text-slate-700 font-medium focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C92A2A] focus:ring-offset-2
mcq_test.option_selected: w-full text-left p-4 border-2 border-[#C92A2A] bg-red-50 rounded-md text-[#C92A2A] font-medium

visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimalistic. Use shadow-sm for cards. Focus on 1px borders (border-slate-200) to separate surfaces.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Avoid in dashboards. Use flat solid colors to prevent visual refraction of data.
visual_enhancers.hover_effects: Use subtle translate-y (transform transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1) on course cards and interactive widgets.

hero_background.description: Student studying on laptop (for login/welcome screen)

course_covers.description: Blackboard with math/physics equations for Science subjects
Close up of numbers and formulas for Math subjects
Colorful 3D abstract geometric shapes for generic batches

instructions_to_main_agent: Load 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. You can use an import from Fontshare or Google Fonts in your main CSS/HTML.
Use standard React (.jsx) and standard Javascript (.js) only. Do not use Typescript (.tsx).
Use Lucide-react for all icons (e.g., BookOpen, PlayCircle, FileText, CheckCircle).
For Shadcn components, override the default border-radius classes to 'rounded-md' or 'rounded-lg' to match the 8px max radius guideline.
Ensure all interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
Maintain strict separation between the sidebar navigation and main content area using standard Flex/Grid.
Do NOT use generic purple or teal gradients. Stick strictly to the defined color palette with Crimson Red (#C92A2A) as the primary brand color.
For the student dashboard 'Upcoming Live Classes', use a horizontal scroll or grid of cards with a prominent 'LIVE' red badge.
